plant.description: Exudate from Himalayan rocks rich in fulvic acid.

method_1.method: Small portion dissolved in warm milk.

medicinal_uses: The 'Conqueror of Mountains' - a master rejuvenator.
Boosts stamina, testosterone, and physical strength.
Used for diabetes, asthma, and chronic fatigue.

safety_profile.warning: MUST use only purified Shilajit. Consult an expert.
safety_profile.medical_supervision: Use under the guidance of a qualified Ayurvedic practitioner.
